task: Advanced task: Hydraulic actuator sizing under shock load using only the embedded materials packet. Materials packet provides three material options (A, B, C) with specified strength, density, and unit cost. Score components: strength 40%, mass 30%, cost 20%, manufacturability 10%. Produce an Excel deliverable and a caveat note with full calculations, assumptions, exceptions, exact row/value citations (do not invent additional records; mark missing inputs as needs_review). Include intermediate calculations, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation to the supplied packet values. No external data lookup allowed beyond understanding the cited public removed context.
